name: Maccaroncelli Alla Quintiere (Macaroni with Cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large frypan over medium heat.
2. Add the onion, green pepper, and celery to the pan. Sauté until golden brown.
3. Stir in the chopped tomato and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add the diced Gorgonzola cheese and cook over low heat until melted.
5. Once the cheese has melted, add the chicken broth, grated Parmesan and Romano cheeses, and white wine to the pan.
6. Simmer the sauce for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Drain the cooked macaroni well, then add it to the frypan with the sauce.
8. Toss the pasta until fully coated in the sauce.
9. Serve immediately.
